underlying_goal: Install and configure cross-session memory tools (claude-diary, claude-hindsight, MCP integration with Obsidian) to maintain context between Claude Code sessions
friction_detail: Initially updated wrong config file (~/.mcp.json instead of /root/.claude/mcp_servers.json), attempted Mac-specific solution on Linux, then over-engineered by editing both CLAUDE.md files when user only referenced the documentation one
brief_summary: Successfully installed claude-diary, claude-hindsight, and configured Obsidian MCP integration with proper hooks for cross-session memory persistence
